prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. Miss Belgium 2023 was the 55th edition of the Miss Belgium pageant, held on February 11, 2023, at the Plopsaland Theater in De Panne, Belgium. Because of the absence of reigning Miss Belgium, Chayenne Van Aarle, Miss Belgium 2021 Kedist Deltour crowned Emilie Vansteenkiste of Flemish Brabant at end of the event. Vansteenkiste will represent Belgium at the Miss World 2023 pageant.The Miss Belgium organisation had to deal with misfortune starting the last week before the event. Reigning Miss Belgium, Chayenne Van Aarle, had a major car accident a few days before the event. She wasn't present at the event because she still had to recover. The event was postponed a few hours before the start because suspicions of a terrorist attack. A suspect was arrested, weapons were
B. Miss Belgium 2023 was held at the Plopsaland Theater in De Panne, Belgium on February 11, 2023, and it was the 55th edition. The event was cancelled due to the absence of Chayenne Van Aarle, the reigning Miss Belgium, who was crowned Miss Belgium 2021 Kedist Deltour. Vansteenkiste will now represent Belgium at the Miss World 2023 pageant. The Miss Belgium organisation faced unfortunate circumstances in the final week before the event, as she was involved in a car accident and was arrested on suspicion of a terrorist attack
C. The 55th iteration of the Miss Belgium beauty contest, known as Miss Belgium 2023, took place on February 11, 2023. The chosen venue for this event was the Plopsaland Theater, situated in De Panne, Belgium. Due to the inability of the current Miss Belgium, Chayenne Van Aarle, to attend, the title was bestowed upon Emilie Vansteenkiste from Flemish Brabant by Miss Belgium 2021, Kedist Deltour, at the conclusion of the evening's proceedings. Ms. Vansteenkiste is subsequently slated to represent Belgium in the Miss World 2023 competition.

The organizers of the Miss Belgium pageant faced a series of unfortunate incidents commencing in the final week leading up to the event. Chayenne Van Aarle, the reigning Miss Belgium, was involved in a severe car accident just days prior to the scheduled date. Her ongoing recovery necessitated her absence from the event. Furthermore, the start of the event was delayed by several hours owing to concerns regarding a potential terrorist attack. A suspect was apprehended, and weapons were subsequently discovered.

Answer:
